title: Rich Roasted Croatian Vegetable Bake
description: A buttery and silky Croatian dish featuring roasted vegetables and sansho, perfect for a vegan-friendly meal, baked to perfection in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced eggplant and zucchini with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, toss the sliced bell peppers with the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil and sansho pepper until they are evenly coated.

In a large cast-iron skillet, arrange a layer of eggplant and zucchini slices, followed by a layer of bell pepper slices, and repeat this process until all the vegetables are used, ending with a layer of eggplant and zucchini on top.
Dot the top of the vegetable layers with vegan butter.
Sprinkle the minced garlic over the top of the vegetables.
Cover the skillet with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
